capabilities_used.evidence: 图4、图6都直接标出 0.5 / 0.618 回撤区作为潜在买回或目标区，典型用法是把前一推动段的 0.618 当作主要支撑带。
图6在大趋势上涨后，等待价格回撤到均线与回撤带附近；图1还写到“still holding long-dated put options… since the fall of 2025”，说明他会围绕大趋势做延续而不是纯短线噪音。
图4、图6都叠加了 50/200 MA；推文“$HIMS Bulls need to help the stock recover its 200 WMA”明确把长期均线当作趋势分界。
推文“$HIMS Bulls need to help the stock recover its 200 WMA... a move above this price will give bulls momentum”就是典型的关键均线收回确认。
图4清楚标注了(1)(2)(3)(4)(5)与后续 ABC 调整，并把未来上行目标写成 3、4、5 三个浪位，这是标准艾略特框架。
图6显示价格跌破中期均线、向下进入 C 浪目标区；图1里他公开维持对 PLTR 的长期看空观点，属于识别并顺应下行 regime。
图4的走势先经历近乎抛物线加速上冲，再进入急跌 ABC 调整；他对高估值 PLTR 的连续唱空也体现对抛物线估值/价格末端的衰竭判断。
推文“Bought some DOCN(SL $75)/NET today”直接公开止损位 SL；另一条还转发“getting better at cutting losers”，说明止损执行是显性规则。
推文里经常用 basket 和分散表达，如“🦞 basket should be safe”，更像组合风险管理而非单点梭哈，符合单笔风险受限思路。
他做的是“short term bounce trade”而不是无条件抄底，同时强调必须在 institutional zone 入场，说明不会在任意瀑布段硬接刀。
推文“US markets open mixed on the release of March CPI data.”、“Vix volatility index is back... Sentiment Indicator...”显示他会用股市风险偏好和波动环境辅助判断仓位。
他专门引用“Vix volatility index is back to its February level below 20”，说明会根据波动率 regime 调整判断；图表里也常配合 TD 和大级别结构避免在高噪音里过度交易。
图2关于“Bessent... Powell summoned Wall Street leaders”与 AI/系统性风险，配合他对 CPI、stagflation、风险资产的讨论，说明会看政策/流动性对市场的二阶影响。
他反复强调“institutional zone”而不是随便画线，隐含对大资金扫流动性后在真实供需区成交的理解；图中回撤进入预设 demand zone 再观察反应，也符合 sweep 后入场逻辑。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Institutional Zone Entry
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Identify price zones where large players likely accumulated or distributed inventory, then wait for price to return to that zone before initiating a trade. The zone matters more than generic support/resistance lines.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 识别机构资金大概率集中建仓/派发的成交区，等待价格回到该区域后再入场；该区域的重要性高于普通支撑阻力线。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 推文原话：“The first step to profitable trading is entering at an institutional zone. This is exactly where institutional money placed large buy or sell orders.”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Volume Profile Node Map
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use visible-range volume profile to locate high-volume acceptance nodes and low-volume rejection gaps, then frame mean reversion or continuation targets around those nodes.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 使用可见区间成交量分布识别高成交接受区与低成交拒绝区，并围绕这些节点制定回归或延续目标。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 图6右侧明显叠加 VRVP/Volume Profile，用成交密集区和空白区来定义 C 浪回撤区与潜在支撑。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: TD Sequential Exhaustion
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Use DeMark/TD setup countdown deterioration or reset behavior to judge when a trend is losing force and when a reversal or pause is becoming more probable.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 利用 DeMark/TD Sequential 的 setup/countdown 递减、重置或衰竭来判断趋势何时失去动能，以及反转/停顿概率何时上升。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: 推文“ The TD has decreased significantly in recent weeks which signals ...”；图4、图6底部也都显示 TD 指标栏。

personal_quirks.quote: The first step to profitable trading is entering at an institutional zone.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 先找大资金真实成交区，再谈方向和盈亏比；没有机构区位，其他线条都不够硬。

personal_quirks.quote: Bought some DOCN(SL $75)/NET today, and also bought PLTR/APP as a short term bounce trade.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 交易可以做反弹，但必须预先定义止损，而且把它写出来。

personal_quirks.quote: Howard Marks just dropped a memo yesterday that every investor should read. Not because you own private credit. But because the pattern he describes is the same pattern that destroys retail portfolios
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 他会把跨市场的信用/流动性模式迁移到交易框架里，用宏观失衡解释技术面风险。

personal_quirks.quote: $HIMS Bulls need to help the stock recover its 200 WMA
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 长期均线不是装饰物，而是多空力量要重新夺回的关键边界。

personal_quirks.quote: I think this is $PLTR fanboi math
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 对热门叙事和拥挤共识天然保持怀疑，尤其在估值脱离增长现实的时候。

unique_traits: 他不是只画经典形态的纯图表派，而是把艾略特波浪、斐波回撤、均线、TD Sequential、成交量分布和“institutional zone”拼成一个可执行的结构化框架。与一般 TA 交易员不同，他很明显带有强烈的估值/叙事反身性和逆向色彩，愿意在热门共识里公开找错价。另一点很突出的是，他会把具体止损、长期均线、波动环境和宏观信用线索放进同一决策流程里。

high_conviction_phrases: The first step to profitable trading is
Bulls need to help the stock recover its 200 WMA
low_conviction_phrases: Market expecting negotiations to go well?
